content: OPcache configuration for Laravel PHP-FPM in Docker: (1) Current TenantSmith Dockerfile does NOT install opcache extension. (2) Must add docker-php-ext-install opcache to Dockerfile. (3) Create opcache.ini with: opcache.enable=1, opcache.memory_consumption=256, opcache.interned_strings_buffer=16, opcache.max_accelerated_files=10000, opcache.validate_timestamps=0 (production - no file stat checks), opcache.save_comments=1 (Laravel needs PHPDoc for attributes), opcache.jit=1255, opcache.jit_buffer_size=128M for PHP 8.3 JIT. (4) Critical: validate_timestamps=0 requires code baked into image (not volume-mounted), which aligns with INFRA-HIGH-1 fix. (5) Copy opcache.ini to /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/opcache.ini in Dockerfile. (6) Estimated 30-50% throughput improvement.
